data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adobe employs a microservices architecture to manage its diverse range of services and products efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Service-oriented architecture using Docker and Kubernetes for container orchestration.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Akamai CDN is used to deliver content quickly and efficiently to a global audience.
data.technical_spec: Integration with Akamai for global content distribution.

data.title: API-First Approach
data.description: Focus on providing RESTful APIs for better integration across products.
data.technical_spec: Use of OpenAPI standards for API definition and documentation.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Adobe utilizes cloud infrastructure to ensure scalability and reliability of its services.
data.technical_spec: AWS and Azure cloud services for scalable server and storage solutions.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Combination of SQL and NoSQL databases to handle structured and unstructured data.
data.technical_spec: MySQL and MongoDB for versatile data handling.
